query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  c.name as client_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'payment' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as total_payments
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id
LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId
WHERE p.id IN (2130117, 2130119, 2130120)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, c.name
ORDER BY p.id;
